'''Ivr Drop''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the director for the [[Allied Grain and Roughage]] corporation at the time of [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel's]] brief employment at an [[agro-combine]] operated by that company. He offered Fel acceptance to the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]] in exchange for Fel refusing to testify against [[Ilir Post]], the son of a member of AGR's board. Fel was the key witness in attempted assault charges against Post.

{{Char-stub}}
